response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical breadth and seniority (20+ years, staff-level roles, scale experience with millions of concurrent requests), but the resume lacks specific expertise in experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, and metrics infrastructure—all central to this Principal-level role. His strong engineering fundamentals could enable domain ramp-up, but at Principal level, deeper hands-on knowledge of growth systems would typically be expected.
strengths: 20+ years of production engineering across multiple scales and domains, with demonstrated experience building systems handling millions of requests/sec
Staff-level technical leadership with clear mentorship and craftsmanship culture (TDD practices, workshops, refactoring dojos)
Proven ability to architect and ship foundational infrastructure that enabled teams (micro-services at Dunnhumby, full-stack systems at re:cinq)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout management—core to the role's domain
Limited evidence of data/metrics infrastructure work, statistical analysis, or experimental design despite 'high data aptitude' being a required qualification
Generalist background suggests breadth over depth in growth systems specifically; recent work at re:cinq is vaguely described and doesn't highlight growth/experimentation work
